generated_assessment.reasoning: High agreeableness (trust, tender-mindedness) and very low openness to experience (conventional, practical) combine with stable, risk-averse personality (low excitement seeking, low anger) to produce a moderate-to-strong opposition to increasing defense spending. This person likely prioritizes domestic welfare and fiscal prudence over military expansion, seeing it as unnecessary or misaligned with compassionate values.
